issues.description: SearchDeck filter is incorrect. The card searches for characters with {Donquixote Pirates} TYPE, not NAME. Filter should be 'ByType' not 'ByName', and name should be 'Donquixote Pirates'.
SearchDeck is missing 'count' field. The text says 'look at 3 cards from the top of your deck', which should be encoded as count: 3.
SearchDeck is missing 'revealCount' field. The text says 'reveal up to 1', which should be encoded as revealCount: 1.
